name: HRA_EVALUATIONS_
description: This table stores the primary data related to Performance Documents.

columns.Name: EVALUATION_ID
columns.Comments: Primary key of the performance document.

columns.Name: TEMPLATE_TYPE_CODE
columns.Comments: Identifies template type of the performance document.

columns.Name: NAME
columns.Comments: Name of the performance document.

columns.Name: USE_CALC_RATINGS_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates if section rating needs to be set based on calculated value.

columns.Name: BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to HR_ALL_ORGANIZATION_UNITS

columns.Name: TEMPLATE_DEFN_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to HRA_TMPL_DEFNS_B

columns.Name: TMPL_PERIOD_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to HRA_TMPL_PERIODS_B

columns.Name: WORKER_ID
columns.Comments: The global ID for the worker.  In the UI this is often represented by the worker's current name

columns.Name: MANAGER_ID
columns.Comments: The global ID for the manager.  In the UI this will be represented as the manager's name

columns.Name: ASSIGNMENT_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_N, holds the ID of the Assignment on which this evaluation is performed.

columns.Name: LANGUAGE_CODE
columns.Comments: Language code for the performance document.

columns.Name: LOCKED_BY_USER_ID
columns.Comments: The global ID for the person who locks the performance document for making changes to the evaluation criteria

columns.Name: STATUS_CODE
columns.Comments: The status code of the performance document

columns.Name: PREV_STATUS_CODE
columns.Comments: The previous status code of the performance document

columns.Name: START_DATE
columns.Comments: The start date of this performance document

columns.Name: END_DATE
columns.Comments: The end date of this performance document

columns.Name: EVALUATION_DATE
columns.Comments: The date on which the evaluation takes place

columns.Name: SELECT_MANAGER_ALLOWED_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates whether worker can select manager when generating document

columns.Name: ROUNDING_RULE_CODE
columns.Comments: Indicates the rounding rule that will be used for ratings that are calculated by the system. Valid values are Standard, Up and Down.

columns.Name: DECIMAL_PLACES
columns.Comments: Indicates the number of decimal places for calculated ratings.

columns.Name: CALCULATION_RATINGS_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates that the system should calculate the ratings for a section or a document.

columns.Name: MAPPING_METHOD_CODE
columns.Comments: This applies to the Overall Rating section, where the system must choose an overall rating from the rating model, based on a calculated rating.

columns.Name: MANAGER_COMMENTS
columns.Comments: Manager comments about the Evaluation

columns.Name: WORKER_COMMENTS
columns.Comments: Worker comments about the Evaluation

columns.Name: STAR_RATING_ENABLED_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates whether star rating should be enabled on the UI or not

columns.Name: KUDOS_REGION_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates whether to include Kudos region in the performance document.

columns.Name: MEETING_HELD_DATE
columns.Comments: Indicates the date on which the review meeting was held between manager and worker

columns.Name: DIGITAL_SIGNATURE_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indiactes if digital signature is enabled

columns.Name: SET_ROLE_MINIMUMS_FLAG
columns.Comments: Stores whether to set the minimum number for each role and also the total number for the evaluation.

columns.Name: SET_ROLE_MAXIMUMS_FLAG
columns.Comments: Stores whether to set the maximum number for each role and also the total number for the evaluation.

columns.Name: TOTAL_MIN_PARTICIPANTS
columns.Comments: Stores the total minimum number of participants required in the document.

columns.Name: TOTAL_MAX_PARTICIPANTS
columns.Comments: Stores the total maximum number of participants required in the document.

columns.Name: ENFORCE_MIN_PCPNS_FLAG
columns.Comments: Stores whether to enforce minimum number of participants allowed in the document.

columns.Name: WRK_SEE_MGR_PCPN_FLAG
columns.Comments: Stores whether worker can see the participants added by manager.

columns.Name: USE_WRK_CONNECTIONS_FLAG
columns.Comments: Stores whether to show the search by workers' network connections in social product when adding participants

columns.Name: PCPN_FEEDBACK_REQ_FLAG
columns.Comments: Stores whether the participant feedback is required

columns.Name: PCPN_DECLINE_OPTION_FLAG
columns.Comments: Stores whether to give the participant the option whether to Accept/Decline the feedback request

columns.Name: AUTO_POPULATE_MM_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicate matrix managers are automatically populated as participants when performance document is created.

columns.Name: SEND_REQUEST_TO_MM_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates request will be sent to matrix manager particpants when performance document is created, which automatically gives them access to the document.

columns.Name: DEFAULT_MATRIX_PCPN_ROLE_ID
columns.Comments: Indicates default matrix role to use when automatically populating matrix managers as participants.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: SHOW_WKR_CALC_RATING_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates whether the Calculated Ratings should be visible to Worker.

columns.Name: SHOW_MGR_CALC_RATING_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates whether the Calculated Ratings should be visible to Manager.

columns.Name: MANAGER_ASSIGNMENT_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENT_M, identifying the assignment of manager who is performing the evaluation

columns.Name: SHOW_MM_CALC_RATING_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates whether calculated ratings should be visible to matrix managers.

columns.Name: SHOW_PCPN_CALC_RATING_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates whether calculated ratings should be visible to participants.

columns.Name: REVIEW_PERIOD_ID
columns.Comments: Indicates the Review Period that is used for the performance document

columns.Name: ACTION_CODE
columns.Comments: Action Code for performing the action on the evaluation.

columns.Name: ACTION_REASON
columns.Comments: Reason for performing the action on the evaluation.

columns.Name: ACTION_PERFORMED_BY
columns.Comments: Stores the Person Id of the person performing the action.

columns.Name: ACTION_PERFORMED_DATE
columns.Comments: Timestamp when the action was performed.

columns.Name: ENABLE_SYNC_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates if the evaluation is configured to use synchronized goals.

columns.Name: CALIBRATION_STATUS
columns.Comments: Calibration Status

columns.Name: CMP_PLAN_ID
columns.Comments: Compensation Plan Id

columns.Name: CMP_PLAN_PERIOD_ID
columns.Comments: Compensation Plan Period Id

columns.Name: CALIBRATION_PERFORMED_BY
columns.Comments: Calibration Performed By

columns.Name: CALIBRATION_PERFORMED_DATE
columns.Comments: Calibration Performed Date

columns.Name: CALENDAR_INVITE_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates whether calendar invite can be created

columns.Name: CALENDAR_INVITE_START_TIME
columns.Comments: Calendar Invite Start time

columns.Name: CALENDAR_INVITE_END_TIME
columns.Comments: Calendar Invite End time

columns.Name: CALENDAR_INVITE_LOCATION
columns.Comments: Calendar Invite location

columns.Name: CALENDAR_INVITE_DESCRIPTION
columns.Comments: Calendar invite description

columns.Name: AUDIT_ACTION_TYPE_
columns.Comments: Action Type - have values like INSERT, UPDATE and DELETE.

columns.Name: AUDIT_CHANGE_BIT_MAP_
columns.Comments: Used to store a bit map of 1s and 0s for each column in the table.

columns.Name: AUDIT_IMPERSONATOR_
columns.Comments: Original Impersonator User.
